title: zornia diphylla var. zeylonensis
intro: Zornia diphylla var. zeylonensis, also known as Zornia, is a perennial herb that belongs to the family Fabaceae and is native to Sri Lanka. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zornia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Zornia is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in the form of powder or oil, which can be added to topical applications or taken internally after consulting a healthcare professional.
